news_items.headline: Diamondbacks’ Vargas, Dodgers’ Muncy injured on violent collision at first base
news_items.summary: Both players lay on the field for several minutes while trainers worked on them in a hushed stadium.

news_items.headline: Dbacks Split! Dbacks 3, Dodgers 2
news_items.summary: The Dbacks were able to split the series with the Dodgers Thursday night thanks to some late inning heroics from none other than Ketel Marte and some terrific pitching from Ryne Nelson and the bullpen. The Dbacks offense was stymied once again for 7 innings until Corbin Carrol hit a home run in the 8th […]

news_items.headline: Yankees star Judge out with stress fracture in rib...
news_items.summary: Yankees outfielder Aaron Judge has been diagnosed with a stress fracture of the first rib on his right side, the team announced Thursday night.

news_items.headline: Reports: Red Sox sending shaky Bello to Triple A
news_items.summary: The Red Sox reportedly are optioning Brayan Bello to Triple-A Worcester, making the move after the right-hander struggled in yet another start Thursday against the Baltimore Orioles.

news_items.headline: Machado vents as Padres' scoring woes persist
news_items.summary: As the losses continue to mount, Padres star Manny Machado admits to being frustrated as the offense just can't seem to put any runs on the board.

news_items.headline: D-backs option Pfaadt after bullpen stint falters
news_items.summary: The Diamondbacks optioned right-hander Brandon Pfaadt to Triple-A Reno to get him stretched back out as a starter following an inconsistent stint as a reliever.

news_items.headline: Muncy, Vargas injured on violent collision at firs...
news_items.summary: Arizona Diamondbacks first baseman Ildemaro Vargas and Los Angeles Dodgers third baseman Max Muncy both left Thursday's game following a violent collision at first base.

news_items.headline: Twins' Ober blames elbow woes on slick baseballs
news_items.summary: Twins right-hander Bailey Ober said he believes an elbow injury that currently has him on the 15-day injured list is the result of the baseballs used in his May 24 start against the Red Sox in Boston.

news_items.headline: Hall, Anderson exit Brewers' loss with injuries
news_items.summary: Brewers relievers DL Hall and Grant Anderson both left with injuries during the team's 12-9 loss to the Giants on Thursday.

news_items.headline: 📈 Top 10 prospect rankings for all 30 teams
news_items.summary: Kiley McDaniel digs in to who's rising and falling in every major league farm system entering June.

news_items.summary: Keeping track of every game this season, all in one place

news_items.headline: Royals rally in ninth, nail first Thursday win of year
news_items.summary: That’s (checks notes) two in a row.

news_items.headline: Ketel Marte walks it off with a homer against Tanner Scott
news_items.summary: Justin Wrobleski’s solid start goes for naught by no offense and the pen allowing three runs in the final two innings

news_items.headline: Pete Crow-Armstrong allows inside-the-park homer, lifts Cubs to walk-off win
news_items.summary: Pete Crow-Armstrong and the Chicago Cubs rallied late on June 4 to get the best of the Athletics with a four-run ninth inning at Wrigley Field.
